headline: Founder and CEO building enterprise AI agents for compliance and due-diligence workflows
title: CEO
confidenceNote: Strong public match for AJ Asver as Parcha founder/CEO and AI-agent operator, though recent public profiles emphasize GREP and San Francisco Bay Area rather than the submitted New York location.
bioMarkdown: AJ builds AI agents for serious enterprise workflows, with a focus on automating compliance, KYB/KYC, due diligence, and risk operations. He brings product and founder experience from Parcha/GREP plus prior fintech and platform roles at Brex, Coinbase, Google, and Compound.

headline: BCG technology-sector leader advising enterprise software companies on AI strategy, growth, and GTM shifts
title: Managing Director & Senior Partner, Global Sector Leader, Technology
confidenceNote: Strong public match for Akash Bhatia at BCG, but public sources list him as Managing Director & Senior Partner in the Silicon Valley/Bay Area rather than the submitted IT Director title and Los Angeles location.
bioMarkdown: Akash leads BCG's global technology sector work, advising software and technology companies on growth, GTM strategy, AI adoption, and business-model shifts. Recent work and writing focus on AI-first SaaS, agentic pricing, and how enterprise tech companies capture value from GenAI.

headline: AI leader at T-Mobile working around telecom AI and customer/network intelligence
title: Director AI
